items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.0.0 is now available.

This release introduces a full rewrite using PyQt6, bringing a redesigned interface and a more scalable foundation for future development.

New features include the Flash Mr. Fusion tab, an in-app Newsfeed, and a Theme Selector with Auto, Light, Dark and Purple modes.

The Scripts tab and update_all configuration have been improved, along with enhancements to network scanning, SaveManager and the wallpaper system.

This release also lays the groundwork for future macOS support, with contributions from DoggyChicken.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
